label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which penguin is the oldest after adding James and deleting Bernard. Let me start by listing all the penguins with their details. First, the original table: - Louis, 7 years old, 50 cm, 11 kg - Bernard, 5 years old, 80 cm, 13 kg - Vincent, 9 years old, 60 cm, 11 kg - Gwen, 8 years old, 70 cm, 15 kg Then we add James: James is 12 years old. So his age is 12. After that, we delete Bernard. So Bernard is removed from the list.
